narrative:
Bay 1 (Pcs) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 889 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
